All code within this folder is vendored from other contributors. This includes:

### /19196956/
- Vendored from: https://zenodo.org/records/19196956
- Contents: ZK proof materials for the associated Google Quantum AI Paper: https://quantumai.google/static/site-assets/downloads/cryptocurrency-whitepaper.pdf. 
- Purpose: Provide proving materials for an SP1 proof of a new Quantum circuit with improved performance in implementing Shor's algorithm.
